arts.ttl: Jeremie Frimpong signing solves two Liverpool issues for Arne Slot thanks to Man City
arts.sum: Liverpool target Jeremie Frimpong could help the Reds solve two massive problems if he joins from Bayer Leverkusen this summer, with Arne Slot reportedly eyeing up a deal for his compatriot

arts.ttl: Leicester XI vs Manchester City – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Leicester City make the trip to the Etihad to face Manchester City in the Premier League this evening. The Foxes face the Premier League champions in wretched form. Ruud van Nistelrooy’s side have lost 13 of their last 14 games in the Premier League to drop to 19th in the table. arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola destroyed as DIVORCE blamed in brutal attack on Man City’s struggles
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola has been unable to work his usual magic at Manchester City this season, and one Arsenal great believes he know why "something has broken" at the Etihad

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City host Leicester City at the Etihad in the Premier League this evening. Pep Guardiola’s side return to league action against the struggling Foxes, after securing progress to the FA Cup semi-finals at the weekend. City won 2-1 at Bournemouth to secure a semi-final berth for the seventh straight season. arts.ttl: Manchester City vs Leicester – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester City welcome a struggling Leicester City side to the Etihad Stadium this evening. At the weekend, Pep Guardiola’s side sealed their place in the semi-final of the FA Cup with a 2-1 win over Bournemouth. However, amidst the elation of progression, there was a major casualty from the battle. arts.ttl: Manchester City ‘even more serious’ about player – Contact made to beat PL rivals
arts.sum: Last weekend, Sky Deutschland journalist Florian Plettenberg stated Manchester City have entered the race for Eintracht Frankfurt’s Hugo Larsson and held initial talks. Manchester City signed Omar Marmoush from the Bundesliga club in January and plan to return in the summer window for the midfielder. arts.ttl: Liverpool, Man City 'battling' Barcelona for La Liga star as £16.7m offer 'is prepared'
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester City allegedly join Barcelona in the race for Rayo Vallecano's Andrei Ratiu during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola told he is 'clueless on Man City bench' by ex-Arsenal footballer
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola has been told by an Arsenal legend that certain tactics have made him look "clueless" amid the club's struggles for form this season

arts.ttl: Man City line-up vs Leicester predicted with Erling Haaland replacement clear and Nico O'Reilly call made
arts.sum: Manchester City take on Leicester City at the Etihad tonight with Erling Haaland sidelined

arts.ttl: Jeremy Monga Leicester City game-time stance set out by Ruud van Nistelrooy
arts.sum: Fifteen-year-old starlet Jeremy Monga can make an impact for Leicester City in the short term – but manager Ruud van Nistelrooy will resist calls for him to feature this season. While City can offer Monga terms, he cannot sign a professional contract until he turns 17, which will be in July 2026.
